stemHtml:
Which one of the following shipments can be loaded in a cargo compartment with a floor loading of 70 kg/m²?

(All pallets are in direct contact with the cargo floor).

options.a: 500 kg on a pallet sized 1 m x 1 m
options.b: 500 kg on a pallet sized 2 m x 2 m
options.c: 600 kg on a pallet sized 3 m x 3 m
options.d: 600 kg on a pallet sized 2 m x 2 m
